name: Studio
description: This room appears to have once been used as a workspace for creative production. The walls and floor are splattered with layers of dried paint in more colors than seem strictly necessary, suggesting sustained effort without a clear stopping point. Nothing of obvious value remains on display. At the south end of the room, an open door stands coated in paint like everything else. A narrow, soot-darkened chimney rises from a fireplace; while it may be possible to climb, the route looks poorly planned for return.
